expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 50000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'protein' OR p.abstract CONTAINS 'protein') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Highly cited protein biochemistry papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The most cited protein analysis papers include the Lowry assay (W1775749144, ~318k citations), SDS-PAGE (W2100837269, ~251k), and Bradford assay (W2128635872, ~225k; W4293247451, ~210k). These foundational methods remain essential in biochemistry laboratories worldwide.

evaluation_questions.question: What are the most cited cancer research papers published in CA: A Cancer Journal for Clinicians?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue {name: 'CA A Cancer Journal for Clinicians'}) RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Global Cancer Statistics series in CA Cancer Journal
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: CA: A Cancer Journal for Clinicians published the GLOBOCAN series: 2020 edition (W3128646645, ~110k citations), 2018 edition (W2889646458), and 2011 edition (W2106787323). All co-authored by Ferlay, Bray, and Jemal, these are the most cited cancer epidemiology papers.

evaluation_questions.question: Find DFT and computational physics papers published in Physical Review journals

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue) WHERE v.name CONTAINS 'Physical' RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: DFT papers in Physical Review journals
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Physical Review journals published key DFT papers: ab initio total-energy calculations (W2083222334), Colle-Salvetti functional (W2023271753), PAW method (W1970127494, W1979544533), Becke exchange functional (W2086957099), and Kohn-Sham equations (W2230728100).

evaluation_questions.question: Find deep learning papers in computer vision co-authored by Kaiming He

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (a:Author {name: 'Kaiming He'})<-[:AUTHORED]-(p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 10000 RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Kaiming He's highly cited deep learning papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Kaiming He's deep learning papers include ResNet (W2194775991) for image recognition and Faster R-CNN (W639708223) for object detection, both co-authored with Jian Sun and Shaoqing Ren. These papers have collectively transformed computer vision.

evaluation_questions.question: Find cancer epidemiology papers co-authored by Freddie Bray and Ahmedin Jemal

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (a1:Author {name: 'Freddie Bray'})<-[:AUTHORED]-(p:Paper)-[:AUTHORED]->(a2:Author {name: 'Ahmedin Jemal'}) RETURN p.id, p.title
expected_evidence.expected_result: Global cancer statistics papers by Bray and Jemal
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Freddie Bray and Ahmedin Jemal co-authored three landmark cancer epidemiology papers: GLOBOCAN 2020 (W3128646645), 2018 (W2889646458), and 2011 (W2106787323) editions of Global Cancer Statistics, providing comprehensive worldwide cancer incidence and mortality data.

evaluation_questions.question: Find PRISMA methodology papers authored by David Moher

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (a:Author {name: 'David Moher'})<-[:AUTHORED]-(p:Paper) WHERE p.title CONTAINS 'PRISMA' OR p.title CONTAINS 'systematic' RETURN p.id, p.title
expected_evidence.expected_result: PRISMA guidelines papers by David Moher
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: David Moher authored the PRISMA guidelines: the updated PRISMA 2020 (W3118615836) and the original PRISMA statement (W2156098321, W4294215472). These papers have fundamentally improved the quality and transparency of systematic review reporting in medical research.

evaluation_questions.question: Find computational physics papers with high citation impact by Georg Kresse

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (a:Author {name: 'Georg Kresse'})<-[:AUTHORED]-(p:Paper) RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Georg Kresse's ab initio calculation papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Georg Kresse authored highly cited computational physics papers: ab initio total-energy calculations (W2083222334, ~117k citations), PAW method (W1979544533, ~81k), and plane-wave basis set efficiency (W2007395042, ~73k). These methods are standard in computational materials science.

evaluation_questions.question: What PRISMA and systematic review papers have been published in BMJ?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue {name: 'BMJ'}) RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: BMJ methodology papers including PRISMA and meta-analysis bias detection
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: BMJ published key methodology papers: PRISMA 2020 (W3118615836), original PRISMA statement (W2156098321), and Egger's graphical test for publication bias in meta-analyses (W2157823046). These papers have shaped evidence-based medicine practices worldwide.

evaluation_questions.question: Find molecular biology methodology papers with high citation impact

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 50000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'molecular' OR p.title CONTAINS 'cloning' OR p.title CONTAINS 'sequencing' OR p.title CONTAINS 'RNA') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Foundational molecular biology methodology papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Highly cited molecular biology papers include molecular cloning manual (W2314225431, ~86k citations), Sanger DNA sequencing (W2138270253, ~69k), and RNA isolation by acid guanidinium method (W2134812217, ~63k; W4294216491, ~47k). These define core molecular biology techniques.

evaluation_questions.question: What are the most cited deep learning papers in computer vision and AI?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 40000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'deep' OR p.title CONTAINS 'neural' OR p.title CONTAINS 'image' OR p.title CONTAINS 'object detection') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Highly influential deep learning and computer vision papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The most cited AI/CV papers include ResNet (W2194775991, ~216k), AlexNet (W2163605009, ~76k), Faster R-CNN (W639708223, ~53k), and GoogLeNet (W2097117768, ~46k). These papers introduced key architectural innovations in deep learning.

evaluation_questions.question: Find plasma physics and fusion research papers published in specialized physics journals

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue) WHERE v.name CONTAINS 'Plasma' OR v.name CONTAINS 'Fusion' RETURN p.id, p.title
expected_evidence.expected_result: Plasma physics papers in specialized journals
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Plasma and Fusion Research published the radiation resistant camera system paper (W3038568908) for monitoring deuterium plasma discharges. This represents specialized instrumentation research for fusion energy applications.

evaluation_questions.question: What statistical methodology papers have been highly cited in psychology?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 50000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'thematic' OR p.title CONTAINS 'moderator' OR p.title CONTAINS 'statistical power') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Highly influential psychology methodology papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Highly cited psychology methodology papers include thematic analysis by Braun and Clarke (W1979290264, ~174k), Baron and Kenny's moderator-mediator distinction (W1971440513, ~72k; W4292811746, ~70k), and Cohen's statistical power analysis (W4300870773, ~84k).

evaluation_questions.question: Find NGS alignment tools published in bioinformatics and methods journals

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue) WHERE v.name IN ['Bioinformatics', 'Nature Methods'] AND (p.title CONTAINS 'alignment' OR p.title CONTAINS 'read' OR p.title CONTAINS 'RNA-seq' OR p.title CONTAINS 'aligner') RETURN p.id, p.title
expected_evidence.expected_result: NGS tools in Bioinformatics and Nature Methods
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: NGS alignment tools span two top venues: Bioinformatics published BWA (W2103441770), SAMtools (W2108234281), Trimmomatic (W2131271579), and STAR (W2169456326), while Nature Methods published Bowtie 2 (W2170551349). Together these form the core NGS data processing pipeline.

evaluation_questions.question: What are the most cited protein analysis papers published in biochemistry journals?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue) WHERE v.name IN ['Journal of Biological Chemistry', 'Analytical Biochemistry'] AND p.citation_count > 50000 RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Foundational protein analysis papers in biochemistry journals
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Top protein analysis papers in biochemistry journals include the Lowry assay in J. Biological Chemistry (W1775749144, ~318k), Bradford assay variants in Analytical Biochemistry (W2128635872, ~225k; W4293247451, ~210k), and the Folch lipid isolation method (W2168526937, ~65k).

evaluation_questions.question: Find papers on behavioral science methodology with high citation impact

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 45000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'behavior' OR p.title CONTAINS 'decision' OR p.title CONTAINS 'acceptance') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Influential behavioral and decision science papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Highly cited behavioral science papers include Ajzen's Theory of Planned Behavior (W2099697766, ~82k), Davis's Technology Acceptance Model (W1791587663, ~62k), Kahneman and Tversky's Prospect Theory (W3011865677, ~46k), and Akaike's AIC model identification (W2142635246, ~50k).

evaluation_questions.question: What cancer epidemiology papers have been published in CA: A Cancer Journal for Clinicians?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue {name: 'CA A Cancer Journal for Clinicians'}) RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Cancer epidemiology papers in CA Cancer Journal
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: CA: A Cancer Journal for Clinicians published the Global Cancer Statistics series (W3128646645, W2889646458, W2106787323) providing GLOBOCAN data on worldwide cancer incidence and mortality, authored by Ferlay, Bray, Jemal, and Siegel.

evaluation_questions.question: Find computational chemistry and DFT papers by Axel D. Becke

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (a:Author {name: 'Axel D. Becke'})<-[:AUTHORED]-(p:Paper) RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Becke's DFT functional papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Axel D. Becke authored two landmark DFT papers: B3LYP density functional (W2143981217, ~101k citations) for thermochemistry, and the Becke exchange-energy approximation (W2086957099, ~53k). These exchange-correlation functionals are among the most widely used in computational chemistry.

evaluation_questions.question: What biological image analysis tools have been published in Nature Methods?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue {name: 'Nature Methods'}) RETURN p.id, p.title
expected_evidence.expected_result: Image analysis and bioinformatics tools in Nature Methods
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Nature Methods published key biological tools: Fiji open-source image analysis platform (W2167279371, ~69k citations), ImageJ's 25-year history (W2099540110, ~63k), and Bowtie 2 for gapped read alignment (W2170551349, ~60k). These tools are essential in modern biological research.

evaluation_questions.question: Find papers on clinical measurement agreement published in The Lancet

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue {name: 'The Lancet'}) RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: Clinical papers in The Lancet
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The Lancet published the Bland-Altman method for assessing agreement between clinical measurements (W2015795623, ~47k citations) and the seminal paper on clinical features of COVID-19 patients in Wuhan (W3001118548, ~52k). Both have had major clinical impact.

evaluation_questions.question: What papers combine structural equation modeling with measurement theory?

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 50000 AND (p.title CONTAINS 'structural equation' OR p.title CONTAINS 'fit indexes' OR p.title CONTAINS 'measurement') RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC
expected_evidence.expected_result: SEM and measurement theory papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: Structural equation modeling papers include Fornell and Larcker's evaluation with unobservable variables (W4235678817, ~65k; W1987258130, ~60k) and Hu and Bentler's cutoff criteria for fit indices (W2071666535, ~102k). These papers define how SEM models are evaluated in social sciences.

evaluation_questions.question: Find highly cited papers that have established foundational techniques across multiple scientific disciplines

expected_evidence.cypher_query: MATCH (p:Paper) WHERE p.citation_count > 75000 RETURN p.id, p.title, p.citation_count ORDER BY p.citation_count DESC LIMIT 10
expected_evidence.expected_result: Most influential cross-disciplinary papers
expected_evidence.expected_ai_response: The most foundational cross-disciplinary papers include the Lowry protein assay (W1775749144, ~318k), SDS-PAGE (W2100837269, ~251k), ResNet (W2194775991, ~216k), GGA approximation (W1981368803, ~205k), thematic analysis (W1979290264, ~174k), and Random Forests (W2911964244, ~121k). These papers have had transformative impact across their respective fields.

metadata.description: Evaluation data with 75 questions based on enriched OpenAlex academic papers (100 papers), designed to test graph-based, semantic search, and parallel hybrid search capabilities. All paper IDs, authors, venues, and citations are verified against the enriched dataset.
